creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Re: <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/4754e9fd33c4fae0359a272d72d9aa7fe75c7a82#diff-88e498485e045af8ef7022b424bc783ca94a1b22188de29d315eca684c2e5d79R18-R19> (lines 18–19) for meta port graphics/nvidia-drm-kmod


You might want to add a CONFLICTS_INSTALL line to the Makefile for these two: 

- nvidia-drm-510-kmod
- nvidia-drm-515-kmod

Thanks.

----

I make this assumption based on past changes, not NVIDIA-specific, such as: 

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/e86cd62dba7ae097b9c07edc4b0774bf768f6d07?diff=split#diff-3fcb57d0457b20a555b9c0793151e547561c8def0092164c3c5a22030f127c88R16>

Related FreshPorts URLs (for comparison purposes): 

- <https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-510-kmod/#conflicts>
- <https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-515-kmod/#conflicts>
